Author: bdg
Name: Mod Snap
Punchline: Right-click a player to save their current mods and appearance into Penumbra and Glamourer.
Description: Adds a 'Save Mods + Appearance' entry to the right-click menu on players (and a /modsnap command for your current target). It snapshots everything currently applied to that character - including mods streamed in by sync plugins like PlayerSync or Mare forks - by driving Penumbra's own Character Pack (PCP) export and immediately installing the result: the mods land in your Penumbra library under the PCP folder, a 'PCP/<name>' collection is created and assigned, and Glamourer creates a ready-to-apply design named after the player (with the mod already associated). The .pcp file itself is kept in Penumbra's export folder so you can archive or share it. Requires a current Penumbra with Character Pack support; Glamourer with 'Attach to PCP' enabled (default) for the design.
